name_en: 🆕 M237 Grey [Top-tier Original] Dynamic Code Syncs with Counter. The Pochette Louise chain bag renews the classic design with a new proportion. Exquisite glossy Epi leather or stylish matte leather shapes the bag, securely storing essentials for night outings. Paired with a lustrous chain, it can be elegantly carried over the shoulder or in hand. 22 x 14 x5
